scripts.setup: npm install --prefix apps/editor && cd apps/server && bun install
scripts.start: concurrently --names "OMNI,SERVER,EDITOR" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "omniroute start" "cd apps/server && bun run src/index.ts" "cd apps/editor && npm run dev"
scripts.start:no-omni: concurrently --names "SERVER,EDITOR" --prefix-colors "green,magenta" "cd apps/server && bun run src/index.ts" "cd apps/editor && npm run dev"
